# Quran Audio — Surahs 9, 10

> Quran MP3 collection for Surahs 9, 10 by 17 reciters.

## Surahs
- 9
- 10

## Reciters
- ar.abdullahbasfar
- ar.abdulsamad
- ar.abdurrahmaansudais
- ar.ahmedajamy
- ar.alafasy
- ar.aymanswoaid
- ar.hanirifai
- ar.hudhaify
- ar.husary
- ar.husarymujawwad
- ar.ibrahimakhbar
- ar.mahermuaiqly
- ar.muhammadayyoub
- ar.muhammadjibreel
- ar.parhizgar
- ar.saoodshuraym
- ar.shaatree

## CDN Links
- jsDelivr: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/nhridoy/9-10@main/{surah_number}/{reciter}/{ayah_number}.mp3
- GitHub Raw: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nhridoy/9-10/refs/heads/main/{surah_number}/{reciter}/{ayah_number}.mp3
- Statically: https://cdn.statically.io/gh/nhridoy/9-10@main/{surah_number}/{reciter}/{ayah_number}.mp3
